notes: Preview-only catalogue — 120+ markets across crypto, sports, tech/AI, politics, economy, entertainment, science, weather and astronomy. Initial YES odds are calibrated against real base rates, recent reporting, and consensus expectations as of May 2026.

markets.title: Bitcoin price ≥ $100,000 USD on May 31, 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Bitcoin close above $100K by end of May?
markets.resolution_source: CoinGecko BTC/USD daily close on May 31, 2026.
markets.YES_condition: CoinGecko reports BTC/USD daily close ≥ 100,000 on 2026-05-31.
markets.why_interesting: BTC has been bouncing around the $100K psychological level all spring. The May close is what every trader is watching.
markets.ui_description: Bitcoin's daily close on the last day of May 2026, measured against the $100,000 line. Resolves off CoinGecko's USD price feed.

markets.title: Solana price ≥ $300 USD before July 1, 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Solana hit $300 before July?
markets.resolution_source: CoinGecko SOL/USD intraday high between 2026-05-04 and 2026-06-30.
markets.YES_condition: CoinGecko reports SOL/USD intraday high ≥ 300 at any point between 2026-05-04 and 2026-06-30.
markets.why_interesting: Solana cleared $250 in March and stalled. Retesting $300 is the next leg up — or a rejection.
markets.ui_description: Tracks Solana's USD price against $300 across May and June. A single tag is enough — does not need to close above.

markets.title: Ethereum market cap > Bitcoin's at any point before 2027
markets.simple_title: Will Ethereum overtake Bitcoin in market cap?
markets.resolution_source: CoinGecko market cap snapshot any time before 2027-01-01.
markets.YES_condition: CoinGecko ETH market cap exceeds BTC market cap at any 5-minute snapshot before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: The flippening — when ETH overtakes BTC — has been crypto's white whale for half a decade.
markets.ui_description: A long-tail YES market. Resolves YES if ETH's market cap ever exceeds BTC's between today and end of 2026.

markets.title: Stablecoin daily volume on Solana > $5B before October 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Solana stablecoin volume hit $5B in a day?
markets.resolution_source: Artemis or DefiLlama stablecoin transfer volume on Solana, daily.
markets.YES_condition: Daily on-chain stablecoin transfer volume on Solana ≥ $5,000,000,000 on any single day before 2026-10-01.
markets.why_interesting: Solana stablecoin volume crossed $3B in March 2026. $5B in a single day would mark a new payments-rail milestone.
markets.ui_description: A growth metric for Solana as payments infrastructure. Tracks the highest single-day stablecoin transfer volume across all Solana stablecoins.

markets.title: Bitcoin price ≥ $150,000 USD before end of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Bitcoin tag $150K this year?
markets.resolution_source: CoinGecko BTC/USD intraday high between 2026-05-04 and 2026-12-31.
markets.YES_condition: CoinGecko BTC/USD intraday high ≥ 150,000 at any point before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Half-cycle target after the 2024 halving. Reaching $150K typically requires a fresh leg up of 50% from current levels.
markets.ui_description: Measures whether Bitcoin can post a fresh all-time high in the back half of 2026.

markets.title: Ethereum price ≥ $5,000 USD before end of Q3 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Ethereum tag $5,000 by end of Q3?
markets.resolution_source: CoinGecko ETH/USD intraday high through 2026-09-30.
markets.YES_condition: CoinGecko ETH/USD intraday high ≥ 5,000 at any point before 2026-10-01.
markets.why_interesting: ETH reclaimed $4K in March but hasn't yet broken its 2021 ATH. $5K marks a new high-water level.
markets.ui_description: ETH has chopped between $3.5K and $4.5K all year. Crossing $5,000 would be a strong bullish signal.

markets.title: U.S. spot Solana ETF approved before October 1, 2026
markets.simple_title: Will the SEC approve a spot Solana ETF before October?
markets.resolution_source: SEC.gov approval order for any spot SOL ETF.
markets.YES_condition: SEC publishes an approval order for any spot Solana ETF before 2026-10-01 00:00Z.
markets.why_interesting: Multiple issuers (BlackRock, VanEck, 21Shares, Bitwise) have spot SOL ETF filings pending. The SEC's posture under the new chair has been notably constructive.
markets.ui_description: Resolves YES if any spot Solana ETF receives final SEC approval (Form 19b-4 + S-1 effective) before October.

markets.title: U.S. spot Ethereum ETFs allowed to stake before end of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will spot ETH ETFs be allowed to stake?
markets.resolution_source: SEC approval order or 19b-4 amendment for ETH ETF staking.
markets.YES_condition: SEC permits any U.S.-listed spot ETH ETF to stake its underlying ETH before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Issuers stripped staking from filings to get the original 2024 approvals. A staking-enabled amendment is the next major catalyst.
markets.ui_description: Resolves YES on the first SEC order permitting any spot ETH ETF to earn staking yield.

markets.title: Jupiter on Solana surpasses $5B TVL in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Jupiter cross $5B TVL?
markets.resolution_source: DefiLlama protocol TVL for Jupiter on Solana.
markets.YES_condition: DefiLlama daily TVL for Jupiter on Solana ≥ $5,000,000,000 at any point before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Jupiter's lend + perp + spot stack pulled in record TVL through Q1. $5B represents a 60–80% jump from current run-rate.
markets.ui_description: TVL is a soft proxy but the cleanest single number for Jupiter's pull as Solana's super-aggregator.

markets.title: Dogecoin price ≥ $1.00 USD at any point in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Dogecoin hit $1 in 2026?
markets.resolution_source: CoinGecko DOGE/USD intraday high through end of 2026.
markets.YES_condition: CoinGecko DOGE/USD intraday high ≥ 1.00 at any point before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: DOGE topped $0.74 in 2021 and $0.45 in late 2024. The $1 line has been the meme target since 2021.
markets.ui_description: A pure narrative market — DOGE/USD has to put together a 4–5x from current levels.

markets.title: XRP price ≥ $5.00 USD before end of Q3 2026
markets.simple_title: Will XRP cross $5 by end of Q3?
markets.resolution_source: CoinGecko XRP/USD intraday high through 2026-09-30.
markets.YES_condition: CoinGecko XRP/USD intraday high ≥ 5.00 at any point before 2026-10-01.
markets.why_interesting: XRP's regulatory overhang lifted in late 2024. Spot XRP ETF filings are pending. A new ATH cycle is on the table.
markets.ui_description: XRP would need a ~70% move from late-April levels to tag $5.

markets.title: Stripe processes ≥ $25B in stablecoin payment volume in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Stripe stablecoin volume hit $25B?
markets.resolution_source: Stripe annual letter or public disclosure for FY2026.
markets.YES_condition: Stripe publicly reports stablecoin payment volume ≥ $25B for calendar 2026.
markets.why_interesting: Stripe's Bridge acquisition and stablecoin product launched in 2024. Volumes have been ramping fast across LATAM and SE Asia.
markets.ui_description: $25B is double the 2025 figure cited by Patrick Collison. Resolves on Stripe's public FY26 number.

markets.title: U.S. SEC files zero new enforcement cases naming a major DeFi token in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will the SEC stay hands-off on DeFi tokens this year?
markets.resolution_source: SEC.gov press releases and litigation tracker.
markets.YES_condition: SEC files zero new enforcement actions in 2026 alleging a DeFi-protocol token (top-100 by market cap) is an unregistered security.
markets.why_interesting: The post-2024 SEC has visibly retrenched on token enforcement. The streak is unprecedented since 2018.
markets.ui_description: Tracks whether 2026 stays clean of new DeFi-token enforcement. NO if even one major suit lands.

markets.title: Tether (USDT) publishes a Big Four audit before end of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Tether get a Big Four audit this year?
markets.resolution_source: Tether press release plus PCAOB-registered Big Four firm audit report.
markets.YES_condition: Tether publishes a full reserves audit (not attestation) signed by Deloitte, PwC, EY, or KPMG before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Tether has promised a full audit for ~10 years. The GENIUS Act puts statutory pressure on the timeline.
markets.ui_description: Attestations don't count — has to be a full audit by a Big Four firm. Strong NO prior.

markets.title: Pump.fun records ≥ $1B cumulative protocol revenue by end of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Pump.fun cross $1B in lifetime fees?
markets.resolution_source: DefiLlama protocol revenue tracker for Pump.fun on Solana.
markets.YES_condition: DefiLlama cumulative protocol revenue for Pump.fun ≥ $1,000,000,000 by 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Pump.fun crossed $700M in fees in March. $1B is the next plateau and a generational consumer-crypto number.
markets.ui_description: A signal of how durable on-chain memecoin culture has become.

markets.title: Coinbase reports ≥ 150M verified users by end of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Coinbase cross 150M users?
markets.resolution_source: Coinbase quarterly earnings (Q4 2026) verified user disclosure.
markets.YES_condition: Coinbase Q4 2026 shareholder letter reports verified users ≥ 150 million.
markets.why_interesting: Coinbase ended 2025 with ~125M verified users. Hitting 150M would mark its biggest growth year since 2021.
markets.ui_description: Resolves on the published Q4 2026 verified user count.

markets.title: Solana mainnet validator count exceeds 2,500 in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Solana have >2,500 validators?
markets.resolution_source: validators.app or stakeview.app validator count.
markets.YES_condition: Validator-set size on Solana mainnet exceeds 2,500 active validators on any day before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Solana sits ~1,400 validators. Firedancer rollout and lower stake requirements could expand the set materially.
markets.ui_description: A decentralization metric. NO is favored without an explicit hardware-cost reduction shipping.

markets.title: Ethereum L2s settle ≥ 80% of total Ethereum transactions in any month of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will L2s settle 80%+ of ETH txs in a month?
markets.resolution_source: growthepie.xyz or L2Beat L2 transaction share.
markets.YES_condition: Monthly L2 share of Ethereum-equivalent transactions reaches ≥ 80% for any calendar month in 2026.
markets.why_interesting: Post-EIP-4844, L2 share has been climbing. Mainnet Ethereum is increasingly a settlement layer rather than an execution layer.
markets.ui_description: A measurement of how decisively L2s have absorbed Ethereum activity.

markets.title: Circle (USDC) trades above $50B market cap by end of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Circle's market cap top $50B?
markets.resolution_source: NYSE close-of-day market cap for Circle (CRCL).
markets.YES_condition: Circle (CRCL) closes with a market cap ≥ $50,000,000,000 on any trading day before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Circle IPO'd in 2025 at ~$28B and has traded between $20B and $40B since. $50B is a significant re-rate level.
markets.ui_description: A barometer for stablecoin issuer valuations after the GENIUS Act's clarity.

markets.title: Solana DEX monthly volume exceeds Ethereum's in any month of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Solana DEX volume top Ethereum's?
markets.resolution_source: DefiLlama monthly DEX volume by chain.
markets.YES_condition: DefiLlama reports Solana monthly DEX volume > Ethereum L1 DEX volume in any calendar month of 2026.
markets.why_interesting: Solana already led Ethereum L1 DEX volume in March and April 2026. The trend looks structural.
markets.ui_description: Already happened in early 2026. Market resolves YES barring a sustained reversal.

markets.title: A Fortune 500 non-tech company adds Bitcoin to its treasury in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will a Fortune 500 non-tech firm buy BTC for its treasury?
markets.resolution_source: 10-K, 10-Q, or 8-K filing announcing BTC treasury holdings ≥ $25M.
markets.YES_condition: An SEC filing in 2026 from a Fortune 500 company outside Software/Internet/Financials sectors discloses BTC treasury holdings ≥ $25M.
markets.why_interesting: MicroStrategy and tech firms have led BTC treasury adoption. A non-tech name (industrials, consumer, energy) crossing the line would mark a new chapter.
markets.ui_description: Excludes already-public crypto holders. The point is the first non-tech name.

markets.title: Solana MEV (Jito tips) revenue exceeds Ethereum MEV-Boost revenue in any month of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Solana MEV outpace Ethereum MEV?
markets.resolution_source: explorer.jito.wtf and mevboost.org monthly tip aggregates.
markets.YES_condition: Monthly Jito tip + priority-fee revenue exceeds total Ethereum MEV-Boost relay payments in any calendar month of 2026.
markets.why_interesting: March 2026 was the first month Solana came within ~10% of Ethereum MEV revenue. The crossover is in sight.
markets.ui_description: An obscure-but-revealing comp for which chain captures more searcher value.

markets.title: Real Madrid wins UEFA Champions League 2025/26 final
markets.simple_title: Will Real Madrid win the Champions League?
markets.resolution_source: UEFA official result for the 2026 Champions League final on 2026-05-30.
markets.YES_condition: UEFA records Real Madrid as the winner of the 2025/26 UEFA Champions League final played on 2026-05-30.
markets.why_interesting: Real Madrid is back in another final after winning in 2024 and reaching the semis in 2025. The final is May 30 in Munich.
markets.ui_description: Resolves on the night of the 2026 UCL final. YES if Real Madrid lifts the trophy, NO otherwise.

markets.title: Boston Celtics win NBA Finals 2026
markets.simple_title: Will the Celtics win the NBA Finals?
markets.resolution_source: NBA official result for the 2026 NBA Finals.
markets.YES_condition: NBA records the Boston Celtics as the 2025/26 NBA Champions on or before 2026-06-25.
markets.why_interesting: Reigning champs from 2024, made it back to the conference finals in 2025. The 2026 run is their last shot before payroll forces a roster shake-up.
markets.ui_description: Resolves on the night of NBA Finals Game 7 (or whenever a team clinches). YES if Boston wins the championship, NO otherwise.

markets.title: USA national team reaches the 2026 World Cup quarterfinal
markets.simple_title: Will the USA reach the World Cup quarterfinals?
markets.resolution_source: FIFA bracket for the 2026 FIFA World Cup hosted by USA, Canada, Mexico.
markets.YES_condition: FIFA records the USA Men's National Team as advancing past the round of 16 to reach the quarterfinal of the 2026 World Cup.
markets.why_interesting: Home tournament, deepest USMNT roster in a decade. Quarters has been the USA's ceiling since 2002.
markets.ui_description: The 2026 World Cup is hosted across the USA, Canada, and Mexico. This market tracks whether the USA Men's National Team reaches the final 8.

markets.title: Max Verstappen wins F1 Drivers' Championship 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Verstappen win the F1 Championship again?
markets.resolution_source: FIA official 2026 F1 season standings after the final race in Abu Dhabi.
markets.YES_condition: FIA records Max Verstappen as the 2026 Formula 1 World Drivers' Champion after the final race on 2026-12-06.
markets.why_interesting: 2026 brings major regulation changes — new power units, new aero. Verstappen's dynasty is either continuing or ending here.
markets.ui_description: Resolves after the final race of the 2026 F1 season in Abu Dhabi (December 6). YES if Verstappen is the champion, NO if anyone else takes the crown.

markets.title: Argentina wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup
markets.simple_title: Can Argentina go back-to-back?
markets.resolution_source: FIFA official result of the 2026 World Cup final on 2026-07-19.
markets.YES_condition: FIFA records Argentina as the winner of the 2026 World Cup final.
markets.why_interesting: Defending champions and group of seven contenders. Messi's last tournament likely.
markets.ui_description: Resolves on the 2026 World Cup final, July 19 at MetLife Stadium.

markets.title: France wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup
markets.simple_title: Can France go all the way?
markets.resolution_source: FIFA official result of the 2026 World Cup final.
markets.YES_condition: FIFA records France as the winner of the 2026 World Cup final.
markets.why_interesting: France has reached three of the last four finals. Mbappé is at peak. Squad depth is among the deepest.
markets.ui_description: Resolves at the final whistle of the 2026 World Cup final.

markets.title: Brazil wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup
markets.simple_title: Will Brazil break the 24-year drought?
markets.resolution_source: FIFA official result of the 2026 World Cup final.
markets.YES_condition: FIFA records Brazil as the winner of the 2026 World Cup final.
markets.why_interesting: Last Brazilian title was 2002. Ancelotti now manages the squad. Talent baseline is strong but recent tournament results have been disappointing.
markets.ui_description: A market on whether the new Ancelotti era delivers immediate results.

markets.title: Nikola Jokić wins NBA MVP 2025/26
markets.simple_title: Will Jokić win MVP again?
markets.resolution_source: NBA official MVP announcement.
markets.YES_condition: NBA names Nikola Jokić as the 2025/26 regular-season MVP at the official ceremony.
markets.why_interesting: Jokić's stat line was again historic. Field is Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and Luka Dončić.
markets.ui_description: Award announced mid-May. Voting is done by media.

markets.title: Edmonton Oilers win the 2026 Stanley Cup
markets.simple_title: Will the Oilers win their first Cup since 1990?
markets.resolution_source: NHL official Stanley Cup Final result.
markets.YES_condition: NHL records the Edmonton Oilers as the 2026 Stanley Cup champions.
markets.why_interesting: Oilers have made two Cup Finals in three years. McDavid is in his prime. The window is closing.
markets.ui_description: Resolves whenever the 2026 Stanley Cup Final concludes.

markets.title: Carlos Alcaraz wins Wimbledon 2026 men's singles
markets.simple_title: Will Alcaraz win Wimbledon again?
markets.resolution_source: Wimbledon official tournament result.
markets.YES_condition: All England Lawn Tennis Club records Carlos Alcaraz as the 2026 men's singles champion.
markets.why_interesting: Three-time defending champion. Sinner is the main contender.
markets.ui_description: Final is July 12, 2026.

markets.title: Iga Świątek wins Wimbledon 2026 women's singles
markets.simple_title: Will Świątek finally win Wimbledon?
markets.resolution_source: Wimbledon official tournament result.
markets.YES_condition: All England Lawn Tennis Club records Iga Świątek as the 2026 women's singles champion.
markets.why_interesting: Świątek has every other major except Wimbledon. Grass remains her weakest surface.
markets.ui_description: Final is July 11, 2026.

markets.title: Los Angeles Dodgers win the 2026 World Series
markets.simple_title: Will the Dodgers three-peat?
markets.resolution_source: MLB official World Series result.
markets.YES_condition: MLB records the Los Angeles Dodgers as the 2026 World Series champions.
markets.why_interesting: Reigning champs with the highest payroll in baseball. Threepeats are historically rare in MLB.
markets.ui_description: Resolves whenever the 2026 World Series concludes.

markets.title: Kansas City Chiefs reach Super Bowl LXI (Feb 2027)
markets.simple_title: Will the Chiefs make another Super Bowl?
markets.resolution_source: NFL official AFC Championship result.
markets.YES_condition: NFL records the Kansas City Chiefs as the AFC Champions for the 2026 NFL season.
markets.why_interesting: Chiefs have made four of the last six Super Bowls. Mahomes-led core is intact.
markets.ui_description: Resolves at the AFC Championship game in late January 2027.

markets.title: Tadej Pogačar wins the 2026 Tour de France
markets.simple_title: Can Pogačar win another Tour?
markets.resolution_source: ASO official Tour de France result.
markets.YES_condition: ASO records Tadej Pogačar as the 2026 Tour de France winner.
markets.why_interesting: Pogačar has won three of the last five Tours. Vingegaard is the main rival.
markets.ui_description: Resolves on the final stage in Paris, July 26.

markets.title: Scottie Scheffler wins the 2026 Open Championship
markets.simple_title: Will Scheffler win the Open?
markets.resolution_source: R&A official 2026 Open Championship result.
markets.YES_condition: R&A records Scottie Scheffler as the 2026 Open Championship winner.
markets.why_interesting: Scheffler has won the Masters and PGA but not yet the Open. The Open is at Royal Birkdale.
markets.ui_description: Resolves on the final round.

markets.title: Jon Jones holds UFC Heavyweight title at end of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Jones still be heavyweight champ?
markets.resolution_source: UFC official rankings on 2026-12-31.
markets.YES_condition: UFC official rankings list Jon Jones as the heavyweight champion on 2026-12-31.
markets.why_interesting: Jones has fought sparingly. Aspinall has been pushing for a unification bout. A retirement announcement would resolve NO.
markets.ui_description: Champion on December 31. Retirement, vacation, or loss all resolve NO.

markets.title: An NFL team finishes the 2026 regular season undefeated
markets.simple_title: Will any NFL team go undefeated?
markets.resolution_source: NFL official 2026 regular-season standings.
markets.YES_condition: NFL official 2026 regular-season standings show at least one team with 17–0 record.
markets.why_interesting: No team has gone 17–0 in the 17-game era. The 2007 Patriots went 16–0.
markets.ui_description: A long-tail YES — historically a once-per-decade event.

markets.title: England men's team reaches the 2026 UEFA Nations League final four
markets.simple_title: Will England make the Nations League finals?
markets.resolution_source: UEFA Nations League 2025/26 quarterfinal results.
markets.YES_condition: UEFA records England as advancing to the 2025/26 Nations League Finals (final four).
markets.why_interesting: England drew Croatia in the QF. Tuchel's first competitive run.
markets.ui_description: Resolves on the second leg of the QF in early June.

markets.title: Lamine Yamal wins the 2026 Ballon d'Or
markets.simple_title: Will Yamal win the Ballon d'Or?
markets.resolution_source: France Football 2026 Ballon d'Or ceremony result.
markets.YES_condition: France Football names Lamine Yamal the 2026 Ballon d'Or winner.
markets.why_interesting: Yamal would become the youngest winner in history. Strong 2025/26 with Barcelona, plus a possible World Cup deep run.
markets.ui_description: Awarded in late October.

markets.title: Carlos Alcaraz wins Roland-Garros 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Alcaraz win another French Open?
markets.resolution_source: FFT official Roland-Garros result.
markets.YES_condition: FFT records Carlos Alcaraz as the 2026 Roland-Garros men's singles champion.
markets.why_interesting: Alcaraz won 2024 and 2025. Sinner has been in form on clay this year. Final is June 7.
markets.ui_description: Resolves at the close of the Roland-Garros men's final.

markets.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5 (or successor) to general availability before October 2026
markets.simple_title: Will OpenAI ship GPT-5 by October?
markets.resolution_source: Official OpenAI announcement and ChatGPT/API availability.
markets.YES_condition: OpenAI publicly releases a model named GPT-5 (or formal next-generation successor) generally available before 2026-10-01.
markets.why_interesting: Sam Altman has hinted at a 2026 release multiple times. GPT-5 specifics are still under wraps.
markets.ui_description: Resolves on the GA launch — research preview alone does not count.

markets.title: Anthropic releases Claude 5 (or numbered successor to Opus 4.7) in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Anthropic ship Claude 5?
markets.resolution_source: Anthropic official model release announcement.
markets.YES_condition: Anthropic publicly releases a model under the Claude 5 brand (or explicit numerical successor) before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Anthropic has shipped 4.5, 4.6, 4.7 in 2026. A version-bump to 5 is a strong directional bet.
markets.ui_description: Resolves on the official 5-series naming, not point releases.

markets.title: Apple announces a second-generation Vision Pro before end of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Apple ship a Vision Pro 2?
markets.resolution_source: Apple keynote or press release confirming a second-gen Vision Pro.
markets.YES_condition: Apple officially announces a second-generation Vision Pro hardware product before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Vision Pro sales disappointed in 2024–25. Reports of a cheaper variant have circulated, full V2 is later.
markets.ui_description: A cheaper variant of the original counts only if Apple positions it as a generational successor.

markets.title: Tesla operates a driverless robotaxi in 5+ U.S. cities by end of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Tesla robotaxi reach 5 U.S. cities?
markets.resolution_source: Tesla press releases plus state DMV permits.
markets.YES_condition: Tesla operates Cybercab or Model Y robotaxi service without safety driver in five distinct U.S. cities (with public availability) before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Tesla launched in Austin in 2025 and Phoenix in early 2026. Permits in three more cities are pending.
markets.ui_description: Driverless = no safety monitor in the vehicle. Pilot programs with safety monitors do not count.

markets.title: Waymo crosses 50M cumulative paid rides by end of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Waymo hit 50M total rides?
markets.resolution_source: Waymo official cumulative ride count disclosure.
markets.YES_condition: Waymo publicly reports cumulative paid rides exceeding 50,000,000 before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Waymo crossed 25M in early 2026. Doubling is the trajectory if they keep their growth pace.
markets.ui_description: Resolves on Waymo's published cumulative count or earnings disclosure.

markets.title: Any frontier lab ships a 10M-token context window LLM in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will any model hit 10M context?
markets.resolution_source: Model card or product page for OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, xAI, or DeepSeek.
markets.YES_condition: A model from a top-tier lab is generally available with a 10M-token (or longer) context window before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Gemini topped 2M in 2024. Claude reached 1M in late 2025. Long-context architectures are a clear research push.
markets.ui_description: API GA only — research previews don't count.

markets.title: A quantum computer with ≥ 5,000 logical qubits is announced in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will quantum cross 5,000 logical qubits?
markets.resolution_source: Peer-reviewed paper or official announcement from IBM, Google, IonQ, Quantinuum, PsiQuantum, or equivalent.
markets.YES_condition: Any organization demonstrates ≥ 5,000 logical qubits in a single quantum computer before 2027-02-01.
markets.why_interesting: Logical qubits are the actual benchmark. Most labs are at <100 logical. Crossing 5,000 would be a generational leap.
markets.ui_description: Logical, not physical qubits. Strong NO prior.

markets.title: A commercial fusion startup reports net-energy-gain commercial pilot operating in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will a fusion startup hit grid-scale net energy?
markets.resolution_source: Helion, Commonwealth Fusion, TAE Technologies, or General Fusion press release plus independent verification.
markets.YES_condition: A privately-funded commercial fusion company reports a sustained, grid-eligible net-energy plant operating before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Helion has a 2028 target. CFS targets 2027. Strong NO prior — this would be epochal.
markets.ui_description: Independent third-party verification required. NIF research shots don't count.

markets.title: Apple announces a foldable iPhone in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Apple unveil a foldable iPhone?
markets.resolution_source: Apple keynote or press release.
markets.YES_condition: Apple officially announces a foldable iPhone product (any form factor) before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Reports point to a 2027 launch. A 2026 announcement would be earlier than expected.
markets.ui_description: An announcement counts — release timing doesn't.

markets.title: Tesla, Figure, or 1X delivers ≥ 10,000 humanoid robots to paying customers by end of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will any company ship 10K humanoids?
markets.resolution_source: Company shareholder letter, press release, or audited delivery count.
markets.YES_condition: Tesla, Figure, 1X, Apptronik, or comparable peer publicly reports cumulative deliveries ≥ 10,000 humanoid robots to non-affiliated customers before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Optimus had a flagship moment in 2025. Figure is in BMW factories. Real customer deliveries at 10K scale would be a watershed.
markets.ui_description: Internal company use does not count — must be paying external customers.

markets.title: Meta sells 10M+ Ray-Ban smart glasses in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Meta sell 10M Ray-Bans this year?
markets.resolution_source: Meta investor disclosure or Counterpoint Research smart-glasses report.
markets.YES_condition: Meta publicly reports or analyst consensus confirms ≥ 10,000,000 Ray-Ban Meta units sold in calendar 2026.
markets.why_interesting: Meta sold ~3.4M in 2024 and ~7M in 2025. Ramp continues with new models in spring 2026.
markets.ui_description: Resolves on Meta or Counterpoint reporting the 2026 unit count.

markets.title: TikTok U.S. operations sold to a non-Chinese owner before October 2026
markets.simple_title: Will TikTok U.S. be sold to a non-Chinese buyer?
markets.resolution_source: Official deal announcement and CFIUS approval.
markets.YES_condition: ByteDance closes a sale of TikTok's U.S. operations to a non-Chinese-owned acquirer with CFIUS approval before 2026-10-01.
markets.why_interesting: The TikTok sale saga has stretched over multiple administrations. New deadlines have been extended repeatedly.
markets.ui_description: Closed sale only — letter of intent or framework agreement does not count.

markets.title: Starlink crosses 10M subscribers by end of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Starlink reach 10M users?
markets.resolution_source: SpaceX official subscriber disclosure.
markets.YES_condition: SpaceX publicly reports Starlink subscribers ≥ 10,000,000 before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Starlink had ~7M subscribers at end of 2025. Direct-to-cell and consumer growth tracks 10M by Q3.
markets.ui_description: A signal of how dominant Starlink has become as global broadband.

markets.title: OpenAI files an S-1 for a 2026 IPO
markets.simple_title: Will OpenAI file to go public this year?
markets.resolution_source: SEC EDGAR S-1 filing.
markets.YES_condition: OpenAI publicly files an S-1 (or equivalent) with the SEC before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: OpenAI's restructure to a public benefit corp in 2025 cleared a path. CFO has hedged on timing.
markets.ui_description: Filed S-1 only — informal pre-discussions don't count.

markets.title: Meta releases an open-weights model ≥ 1T parameters in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Meta open-source a 1T+ param model?
markets.resolution_source: Hugging Face / Meta AI release with verifiable parameter count.
markets.YES_condition: Meta publicly releases an open-weights LLM (downloadable) with ≥ 1 trillion total parameters before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Llama 4 maxed at 405B. Llama 5 has been signaled. Open-weights at 1T would set a new bar.
markets.ui_description: Total parameters, not active. Open weights downloadable on launch.

markets.title: U.S. expands AI chip export controls in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will the U.S. tighten AI chip export controls?
markets.resolution_source: Bureau of Industry and Security (BIS) Federal Register entry.
markets.YES_condition: BIS publishes a new or amended export control rule materially expanding restrictions on AI accelerators to China before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Export controls have tightened every 12–18 months since 2022. The pattern is well established.
markets.ui_description: Material expansion only — minor technical updates don't count.

markets.title: Democrats win the U.S. House majority in November 2026 midterms
markets.simple_title: Will Democrats flip the U.S. House?
markets.resolution_source: AP Race Calls and certified state results.
markets.YES_condition: AP calls a Democratic majority (≥ 218 seats) in the U.S. House for the 119th Congress before 2026-11-15.
markets.why_interesting: Generic ballot polling has favored Dems through spring. Republican incumbents face redistricting and a midterm headwind.
markets.ui_description: Standard midterm dynamics historically favor the out-party.

markets.title: Republicans hold or expand U.S. Senate majority in 2026 midterms
markets.simple_title: Will Republicans keep the Senate?
markets.resolution_source: AP Race Calls and certified state results.
markets.YES_condition: AP calls Republican Senate seats ≥ Republican Senate seats from 2024 (53) for the 120th Congress.
markets.why_interesting: The 2026 Senate map favors Republicans. They defend fewer competitive seats than Democrats.
markets.ui_description: Holding or growing the majority resolves YES.

markets.title: UK calls a general election in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will the UK have an election in 2026?
markets.resolution_source: UK Parliament dissolution notice.
markets.YES_condition: UK Parliament dissolves with a general election scheduled before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Labour's mandate runs until 2029. An early election requires a Conservative or LibDem motion to succeed, or a Labour-led decision.
markets.ui_description: Dissolution notice triggers the YES — actual vote timing doesn't matter.

markets.title: Japan replaces its Prime Minister in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Japan change PMs this year?
markets.resolution_source: Kantei official announcement and Diet vote.
markets.YES_condition: A new Prime Minister of Japan takes office before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Japan has churned through PMs. Current incumbent's approval has been volatile.
markets.ui_description: A formal succession in office triggers YES.

markets.title: Canada calls a federal election in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Canada have an election in 2026?
markets.resolution_source: Elections Canada official writ.
markets.YES_condition: A federal election writ is dropped before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Canada had a 2025 vote already. Mandate runs until 2029 unless a confidence vote falls.
markets.ui_description: Writ being dropped is enough — vote does not have to happen in 2026.

markets.title: A formal Russia-Ukraine ceasefire agreement signed in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Russia and Ukraine sign a ceasefire?
markets.resolution_source: Joint signed agreement reported by AP/Reuters/Kyiv Independent.
markets.YES_condition: Russia and Ukraine sign a bilateral or multilateral ceasefire instrument before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Talks have wobbled in and out of progress all year. A signed ceasefire would be a watershed.
markets.ui_description: Formal signed agreement only — verbal or temporary truces do not count.

markets.title: U.S. and Iran sign a new nuclear framework in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will the U.S. and Iran ink a nuclear deal?
markets.resolution_source: U.S. State Department announcement.
markets.YES_condition: U.S. and Iran formally sign a new nuclear non-proliferation framework before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Talks resumed in spring 2026. Past frameworks (JCPOA) took years.
markets.ui_description: Signed framework only — informal understanding doesn't count.

markets.title: China conducts a major military exercise around Taiwan in H2 2026
markets.simple_title: Will China hold a major drill around Taiwan?
markets.resolution_source: Taiwan Ministry of National Defense daily briefings.
markets.YES_condition: PLA conducts a named encirclement or large-scale exercise around Taiwan in H2 2026 (≥ 50 PLA aircraft incursions in a single day).
markets.why_interesting: PLA has staged major drills (Joint Sword 2024 A/B, 2024 C, 2025) at consistent ~6-month intervals.
markets.ui_description: Following an established pattern — strong YES.

markets.title: EU issues first major AI Act fine (>€100M) in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will the EU issue a major AI Act fine?
markets.resolution_source: European Commission AI Office enforcement notice.
markets.YES_condition: European Commission AI Office issues a fine ≥ €100M for AI Act violation before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: AI Act enforcement powers came online in February 2025. First major case is being watched closely.
markets.ui_description: Single fine ≥ €100M required. Smaller fines or administrative actions don't count.

markets.title: Germany's coalition government holds together through end of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Germany's government survive 2026?
markets.resolution_source: Bundestag confidence vote records.
markets.YES_condition: Germany's federal government does not lose a confidence vote or formally dissolve before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Merz government took office in May 2025. Past coalitions have survived ~3–4 years on average.
markets.ui_description: Vote of no-confidence or formal dissolution triggers NO.

markets.title: Jerome Powell exits as Fed Chair before May 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Powell leave the Fed?
markets.resolution_source: Federal Reserve official announcement.
markets.YES_condition: Jerome Powell ceases to be Fed Chair before 2026-05-15 (term ends 2026-05-15).
markets.why_interesting: Powell's term ends May 15, 2026. He has signaled he won't seek another term but has not committed to leaving the Board.
markets.ui_description: Resigning the Chair role is what triggers YES — Board seat tenure separately runs to 2028.

markets.title: U.S. Supreme Court has a vacancy in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will SCOTUS have a vacancy this year?
markets.resolution_source: U.S. Supreme Court official announcement.
markets.YES_condition: A Supreme Court Justice retires, dies, or is otherwise replaced before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Justices Thomas (77), Alito (76), and Sotomayor (71) are oldest. A retirement or unexpected vacancy is plausible but not expected.
markets.ui_description: Any departure from the court triggers YES.

markets.title: U.S. designates a Mexican cartel under a major military strike in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will the U.S. strike a Mexican cartel?
markets.resolution_source: DOD or White House public confirmation.
markets.YES_condition: U.S. military or intelligence services publicly conduct a kinetic strike against Mexican cartel targets on Mexican soil before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Trump administration designated cartels as foreign terrorist organizations. Kinetic action has been threatened publicly.
markets.ui_description: Direct kinetic action only — sanctions/intel sharing don't count.

markets.title: Pope Leo XIV issues his first encyclical in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Pope Leo XIV issue an encyclical?
markets.resolution_source: Vatican press office.
markets.YES_condition: Pope Leo XIV publishes a formal encyclical letter before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Pope Leo XIV (elected May 2025) is approaching the typical first-encyclical timeline.
markets.ui_description: Resolves on the official Vatican publication.

markets.title: Federal Reserve cuts rates at least once before September 2026
markets.simple_title: Will the Fed cut rates by September?
markets.resolution_source: Federal Reserve FOMC statement and target rate.
markets.YES_condition: FOMC reduces the federal funds target rate by ≥ 25bps in any meeting before 2026-10-01.
markets.why_interesting: Markets are pricing two cuts in by September. Inflation has cooled but employment has been resilient.
markets.ui_description: Resolves on the first cut of 2026 (or stays NO if none).

markets.title: U.S. enters NBER-defined recession by end of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will the U.S. enter a recession?
markets.resolution_source: NBER Business Cycle Dating Committee announcement.
markets.YES_condition: NBER announces a U.S. recession with start date before 2027-01-01 (announcement may come later).
markets.why_interesting: Recession-watching has been a sport since 2022. NBER classifications often lag the actual onset by 6–12 months.
markets.ui_description: Long-tail resolution since NBER calls are retrospective. Settles by mid-2027 at the latest.

markets.title: S&P 500 closes above 7,000 in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will the S&P 500 close above 7,000?
markets.resolution_source: S&P Global daily close.
markets.YES_condition: S&P 500 daily close ≥ 7,000 on any trading day before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: S&P 500 closed Q1 2026 around 6,250. 7,000 is ~12% upside.
markets.ui_description: A bullish-leaning bet — historically S&P logs ~10% gains per year on average.

markets.title: U.S. headline CPI prints below 2.0% YoY in any month of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will CPI print below 2%?
markets.resolution_source: BLS monthly CPI report.
markets.YES_condition: BLS reports headline CPI 12-month change < 2.0% in any month released before 2027-01-15.
markets.why_interesting: CPI has hovered between 2.5% and 3.5% all year. A sub-2% print would mark the first since 2021.
markets.ui_description: Headline CPI, not core.

markets.title: Gold spot price exceeds $3,500/oz in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will gold cross $3,500/oz?
markets.resolution_source: LBMA PM gold fix.
markets.YES_condition: LBMA PM gold fix ≥ 3,500 USD/oz on any trading day before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Gold cleared $3,000 in early 2025 and has been consolidating around $3,250. Central bank buying remains heavy.
markets.ui_description: A gold-bull bet — needs a ~7% move to tag.

markets.title: WTI crude oil exceeds $100/bbl in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will WTI crude top $100?
markets.resolution_source: NYMEX front-month WTI close.
markets.YES_condition: NYMEX front-month WTI close ≥ 100 USD/bbl on any trading day before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: WTI has traded in the $65–80 band most of the year. $100 requires a major supply shock or demand surprise.
markets.ui_description: A geopolitics-or-demand-shock bet.

markets.title: U.S. unemployment rate exceeds 5.0% in any month of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will unemployment cross 5%?
markets.resolution_source: BLS monthly Employment Situation report.
markets.YES_condition: BLS reports U-3 unemployment rate ≥ 5.0% in any month released before 2027-01-15.
markets.why_interesting: Unemployment has been edging up since mid-2025 from ~4.0% to ~4.4%.
markets.ui_description: 5% is the recession-precursor threshold under the Sahm rule.

markets.title: China FY2026 GDP growth ≥ 5.0%
markets.simple_title: Will China hit 5% GDP growth?
markets.resolution_source: National Bureau of Statistics of China FY26 release.
markets.YES_condition: NBS reports China's 2026 GDP growth ≥ 5.0% in its FY release.
markets.why_interesting: China's official target for 2026 is 'around 5%'. Hitting on the nose is the historical pattern but trade tensions add risk.
markets.ui_description: Resolves on official statistic.

markets.title: 30-year U.S. Treasury yield exceeds 6.0% in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will the 30Y yield top 6%?
markets.resolution_source: Treasury Department daily yield curve.
markets.YES_condition: U.S. Treasury 30-year constant maturity yield closes ≥ 6.0% on any trading day before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: 30Y has been hovering around 4.7%. 6% would be the highest since 2008 — major fiscal-stress scenario.
markets.ui_description: A tail-risk hedge market.

markets.title: USD/JPY trades below 130 in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will the yen strengthen below 130?
markets.resolution_source: Bloomberg or Reuters USD/JPY intraday tick.
markets.YES_condition: USD/JPY intraday low ≤ 130.00 on any trading day before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Yen has weakened to ~155. BoJ tightening cycle could squeeze the carry trade.
markets.ui_description: A reversal-of-carry-trade thesis.

markets.title: S&P 500 ends 2026 in the red (negative YTD)
markets.simple_title: Will the S&P close 2026 down?
markets.resolution_source: S&P 500 official year-end close vs prior year close.
markets.YES_condition: S&P 500 year-end 2026 close lower than year-end 2025 close.
markets.why_interesting: Three down years in a decade is the historical base rate. S&P is up YTD as of May.
markets.ui_description: A bear-case bet.

markets.title: U.S. housing starts (annualized) exceed 1.6M in any month of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will housing starts cross 1.6M?
markets.resolution_source: U.S. Census Bureau monthly housing starts release.
markets.YES_condition: Annualized housing starts (any seasonal series) ≥ 1,600,000 in any month before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Housing starts have been stuck around 1.35M. A meaningful rate cut could unleash supply.
markets.ui_description: A leading indicator for the housing market.

markets.title: Avatar: Fire and Ash crosses $2B at the global box office
markets.simple_title: Will Avatar 3 hit $2B?
markets.resolution_source: Box Office Mojo / The Numbers worldwide gross.
markets.YES_condition: Avatar: Fire and Ash worldwide gross ≥ $2,000,000,000 by 2026-09-30.
markets.why_interesting: Avatar 1 and 2 both crossed $2B. Avatar 3 (Dec 2025 release) is on a similar trajectory.
markets.ui_description: Resolves on the official cumulative box office figure.

markets.title: Grand Theft Auto VI releases on schedule before October 2026
markets.simple_title: Will GTA VI ship by October?
markets.resolution_source: Rockstar Games official release announcement.
markets.YES_condition: Rockstar Games confirms GTA VI is publicly available on a major console or PC platform before 2026-10-01.
markets.why_interesting: Rockstar held the May 2026 release window through Q1. A delay to Q4 is the risk.
markets.ui_description: Resolves on actual public availability — not a delay announcement.

markets.title: At least one 2026 movie crosses $1B at the global box office before September
markets.simple_title: Will any 2026 movie hit $1B by September?
markets.resolution_source: Box Office Mojo cumulative grosses for 2026 releases.
markets.YES_condition: At least one movie released in 2026 has worldwide gross ≥ $1,000,000,000 by 2026-08-31.
markets.why_interesting: Summer 2026 slate includes Toy Story 5, F1 sequel, Mission Impossible 9, Avengers Doomsday.
markets.ui_description: A signal for whether theatrical recovery is on track.

markets.title: Stranger Things season 5 finale streams before December 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Stranger Things end this year?
markets.resolution_source: Netflix release schedule.
markets.YES_condition: Netflix releases the final episode of Stranger Things season 5 before 2026-12-01.
markets.why_interesting: Season 5 is confirmed for late 2026. Netflix has held the November release window.
markets.ui_description: All episodes released by Nov 30 resolves YES.

markets.title: FromSoftware ships a new Elden Ring expansion in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Elden Ring get new content?
markets.resolution_source: FromSoftware / Bandai Namco announcement.
markets.YES_condition: FromSoftware publicly releases a new paid Elden Ring expansion or successor before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Shadow of the Erdtree was the only DLC. A second expansion has been rumored but not confirmed.
markets.ui_description: Paid expansion only — patches don't count.

markets.title: Oppenheimer-style historical drama wins Best Picture at 99th Academy Awards (March 2027)
markets.simple_title: Will a historical drama win Best Picture?
markets.resolution_source: Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences announcement.
markets.YES_condition: AMPAS awards Best Picture to a historical drama (set primarily before 2000) at the 99th Awards on 2027-03-07.
markets.why_interesting: Historical dramas have won 4 of the last 8 Best Picture awards.
markets.ui_description: Genre call — drama set in historical period.

markets.title: Sweden wins Eurovision 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Sweden win Eurovision?
markets.resolution_source: EBU official Eurovision result.
markets.YES_condition: EBU records Sweden as the winner of the 2026 Eurovision Song Contest on 2026-05-16.
markets.why_interesting: Hosted in Vienna after Austria's 2025 win. Bookmakers favor a few mid-tier countries.
markets.ui_description: Resolves at the close of Eurovision 2026 final.

markets.title: Taylor Swift announces a new studio album in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Taylor Swift drop a new album?
markets.resolution_source: Official Taylor Swift social media or press release.
markets.YES_condition: Taylor Swift publicly announces a new studio album (not re-recording) before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: TS12 was teased on Eras Tour. Announcement is widely expected in 2026.
markets.ui_description: Announcement only — release date doesn't have to be 2026.

markets.title: Joe Rogan signs a new exclusivity deal in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Rogan re-sign with Spotify?
markets.resolution_source: Spotify or competitor announcement.
markets.YES_condition: Joe Rogan publicly signs an exclusive content deal worth ≥ $250M before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Rogan's last deal was reported at $250M. Renewal terms are being negotiated.
markets.ui_description: Public confirmation of new deal triggers YES.

markets.title: Beyoncé wins Album of the Year at the 69th Grammys (Feb 2027)
markets.simple_title: Will Beyoncé win Album of the Year again?
markets.resolution_source: Recording Academy 69th Grammy Awards.
markets.YES_condition: Recording Academy awards Album of the Year to Beyoncé at the 69th Grammys on 2027-02-07.
markets.why_interesting: Beyoncé won Album in 2025 with Cowboy Carter. Winning two consecutively would be historic.
markets.ui_description: Resolves at the Grammy ceremony in early February 2027.

markets.title: House of the Dragon season 3 premieres in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will HotD season 3 air this year?
markets.resolution_source: HBO official premiere date.
markets.YES_condition: HBO airs House of the Dragon season 3 episode 1 before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: HBO has guided to a 'late 2026' premiere. Filming wrapped in early 2026.
markets.ui_description: First episode airing triggers YES.

markets.title: Dune: Part Three opens in U.S. theaters in December 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Dune 3 release in December?
markets.resolution_source: Warner Bros. official release.
markets.YES_condition: Warner Bros. premieres Dune: Part Three in U.S. theaters before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Warner has guided to December 18, 2026. Production wrapped in late 2025.
markets.ui_description: Theatrical release date is the trigger.

markets.title: JWST confirms liquid-water ocean signature on a moon of Jupiter or Saturn in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will JWST confirm an ocean moon?
markets.resolution_source: Peer-reviewed paper from JWST team or NASA press conference.
markets.YES_condition: Peer-reviewed paper confirms liquid-water ocean detection on Europa, Enceladus, or Titan via JWST data before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: JWST has imaged Europa plumes and Saturn's moons. A confirmed ocean detection would be a paradigm shift.
markets.ui_description: Peer-review threshold required.

markets.title: First AlphaFold-derived drug enters Phase 3 clinical trials in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will an AlphaFold drug reach Phase 3?
markets.resolution_source: ClinicalTrials.gov registration.
markets.YES_condition: A small molecule designed using AlphaFold or successor structures begins Phase 3 trials before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Isomorphic Labs and others have multiple Phase 1 candidates. Phase 3 would be a major validation.
markets.ui_description: Phase 3 listing on ClinicalTrials.gov triggers YES.

markets.title: FDA approves a new CRISPR-based therapy in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will FDA approve another CRISPR drug?
markets.resolution_source: FDA approval letter on FDA.gov.
markets.YES_condition: FDA grants Biologics License Approval to a new CRISPR-based therapy before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Casgevy was the first in 2023. Multiple Phase 3 candidates are due for review in 2026.
markets.ui_description: BLA approval triggers YES.

markets.title: Colossal Biosciences announces a successful proof-of-concept for the woolly mammoth in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Colossal show a mammoth proof-of-concept?
markets.resolution_source: Colossal Biosciences press release with peer review.
markets.YES_condition: Colossal Biosciences publicly announces successful production of viable mammoth-genome cell lines or embryo before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Colossal has hit milestones on the dire wolf and dodo programs. Mammoth is the flagship project with a 2028 target.
markets.ui_description: Proof-of-concept only — no live mammoth required.

markets.title: An AI system formally solves a Millennium Prize Problem in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will an AI solve a Millennium Prize?
markets.resolution_source: Clay Mathematics Institute formal acceptance.
markets.YES_condition: Clay Mathematics Institute formally accepts an AI-system-derived solution to one of the Millennium Prize Problems before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: AI math has accelerated dramatically (DeepMind AlphaGeometry, FunSearch). But a Millennium Prize is a different bar.
markets.ui_description: A moonshot bet.

markets.title: A tokamak achieves Q ≥ 5 in a fusion shot in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will any tokamak hit Q ≥ 5?
markets.resolution_source: ITER, JT-60SA, or comparable peer-reviewed report.
markets.YES_condition: Peer-reviewed publication or official press conference reports a tokamak achieving Q (energy gain) ≥ 5 in a single fusion shot before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: JT-60SA has been operating. ITER first plasma slipped to 2034. Q ≥ 5 is the major scientific threshold.
markets.ui_description: Q is the gain ratio. Distinct from net-electricity.

markets.title: Peer-reviewed evidence of a room-temperature superconductor in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will room-temp superconductor be confirmed?
markets.resolution_source: Peer-reviewed Nature, Science, or PRL publication with replicated data.
markets.YES_condition: Peer-reviewed publication confirms room-temperature superconductivity at ambient pressure with replicated independent data before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Recurring claims (LK-99, etc) keep getting walked back. Real one would be Nobel-tier.
markets.ui_description: Independent replication required — a single paper isn't enough.

markets.title: Pacific Ring of Fire records a M7.5+ earthquake before September 2026
markets.simple_title: Will the Pacific Ring see a M7.5+ quake?
markets.resolution_source: USGS Earthquake Hazards Program.
markets.YES_condition: USGS records an earthquake of magnitude ≥ 7.5 in the Pacific Ring of Fire before 2026-09-01.
markets.why_interesting: Historical base rate for M7.5+ in the Pacific Ring is ~1 every 4–6 months.
markets.ui_description: Standard global earthquake risk priced in.

markets.title: First named hurricane of the 2026 Atlantic season forms before July
markets.simple_title: Will a named hurricane form by July?
markets.resolution_source: National Hurricane Center.
markets.YES_condition: NHC names at least one Atlantic basin tropical storm or hurricane before 2026-07-01.
markets.why_interesting: Atlantic hurricane season starts June 1. Pre-season storms are increasingly common.
markets.ui_description: Tropical Storm or higher named on NHC's product.

markets.title: Reykjanes Peninsula has a new volcanic eruption in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Iceland's Reykjanes erupt again?
markets.resolution_source: Icelandic Met Office (vedur.is).
markets.YES_condition: Icelandic Met Office confirms a new fissure eruption on the Reykjanes Peninsula before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Reykjanes has erupted ~9 times since 2021. Activity is ongoing.
markets.ui_description: Standard pattern continues — strong YES.

markets.title: New Zealand records a M6.5+ earthquake in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will NZ have a major quake?
markets.resolution_source: GeoNet New Zealand earthquake catalog.
markets.YES_condition: GeoNet records an earthquake of magnitude ≥ 6.5 in New Zealand before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: NZ averages 1 M6.5+ every 1–2 years.
markets.ui_description: Base-rate market on NZ seismicity.

markets.title: A Category 5 Atlantic hurricane forms in the 2026 season
markets.simple_title: Will any 2026 storm reach Cat 5?
markets.resolution_source: National Hurricane Center.
markets.YES_condition: NHC records at least one Atlantic basin hurricane reaching Category 5 (≥ 157mph) during the 2026 season.
markets.why_interesting: Recent seasons have averaged 1+ Cat 5 each. Sea surface temps remain elevated.
markets.ui_description: A heavy season with Atlantic warmth typically produces a Cat 5.

markets.title: London records a 30°C+ day in May 2026
markets.simple_title: Will London hit 30°C in May?
markets.resolution_source: UK Met Office Heathrow station.
markets.YES_condition: Heathrow records max daily temperature ≥ 30.0°C in May 2026.
markets.why_interesting: London hit 27.5°C in late April. May 30°C days are increasingly common but not certain.
markets.ui_description: A simple threshold based on Heathrow's official record.

markets.title: Paris has clear skies during the August 12, 2026 partial eclipse
markets.simple_title: Will Paris see the Aug 12 eclipse?
markets.resolution_source: Météo-France hourly observations.
markets.YES_condition: Météo-France records mean cloud cover < 35% over Paris between 18:00 and 20:00 local on 2026-08-12.
markets.why_interesting: A massive partial eclipse over Paris. Weather is the only thing between observers and a generational view.
markets.ui_description: A sub-market for the Aug 12 eclipse — focused on Paris.

markets.title: Tokyo records a 40°C+ day in summer 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Tokyo hit 40°C this summer?
markets.resolution_source: Japan Meteorological Agency observations.
markets.YES_condition: JMA records max daily temperature ≥ 40.0°C at any official Tokyo metro station between 2026-06-01 and 2026-09-30.
markets.why_interesting: Tokyo summers have grown hotter. 40°C was hit only in the suburb stations historically. 2025 came close in central Tokyo.
markets.ui_description: Single station crossing 40°C triggers YES.

markets.title: ISS receives a final crew rotation announcement in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will ISS retirement timeline be locked?
markets.resolution_source: NASA official press release.
markets.YES_condition: NASA publicly announces the ISS final crew rotation schedule before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: ISS is targeted for deorbit in 2031. Final crew rotation planning is the last formal milestone.
markets.ui_description: A 'lock-in' market on the ISS sunset plan.

markets.title: Blue Origin's New Glenn flies a third successful mission in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will New Glenn fly 3 times this year?
markets.resolution_source: Blue Origin and FAA launch logs.
markets.YES_condition: Blue Origin successfully launches New Glenn three times in calendar 2026.
markets.why_interesting: Blue Origin had its first New Glenn mission in early 2025 and a second in late 2025. Cadence has been slow.
markets.ui_description: Three successful launches in 2026.

markets.title: SpaceX announces a 2027 Mars Starship launch in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will SpaceX commit to a 2027 Mars launch?
markets.resolution_source: SpaceX official statement.
markets.YES_condition: SpaceX publicly announces a Starship Mars launch attempt in 2027 before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Musk has signaled 2027 is the next Mars window. A formal commitment is rare.
markets.ui_description: Formal commitment with manifest line — speculation tweets don't count.

markets.title: ISRO completes a crewed Gaganyaan flight before end of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Gaganyaan put humans in orbit?
markets.resolution_source: ISRO official mission report.
markets.YES_condition: ISRO completes a crewed Gaganyaan orbital mission before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Gaganyaan has slipped multiple times. Recent uncrewed test flights succeeded. 2026 crewed flight is the official target.
markets.ui_description: First Indian astronauts on an Indian craft.

markets.title: SpaceX exceeds 200 orbital launches in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will SpaceX hit 200 launches?
markets.resolution_source: FAA launch logs.
markets.YES_condition: SpaceX completes 200 orbital launches in calendar 2026.
markets.why_interesting: SpaceX hit 134 launches in 2024 and ~170 in 2025. 200 would be another step up.
markets.ui_description: Annual orbital launch count milestone.

markets.title: ESA Comet Interceptor launches before end of 2029
markets.simple_title: Will Comet Interceptor launch by 2029?
markets.resolution_source: ESA official launch confirmation.
markets.YES_condition: ESA confirms Comet Interceptor's launch slot is locked for 2028 or 2029 before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Comet Interceptor will visit a long-period comet. The 2029 launch window with Ariane 6 is the current target.
markets.ui_description: ESA confirmation of the slot lock.

markets.title: An asteroid occults a star brighter than mag 3 in 2026 (visible from Europe)
markets.simple_title: Will a bright asteroid occultation hit Europe?
markets.resolution_source: International Occultation Timing Association predictions.
markets.YES_condition: IOTA confirms at least one asteroid-on-bright-star occultation visible from Europe in 2026.
markets.why_interesting: Asteroid occultations are a regular phenomenon but bright-star, Europe-visible events are rarer.
markets.ui_description: An IOTA-confirmed event triggers YES.

markets.title: A supernova brighter than mag 12 in a Local Group galaxy is discovered in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will a bright supernova be found?
markets.resolution_source: Transient Name Server (TNS).
markets.YES_condition: TNS records a confirmed supernova in a Local Group galaxy with peak magnitude ≤ 12.0 before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Local Group bright SNe are rare — last big one was SN 1987A in the LMC. A bright Andromeda or M33 SN would be a sensation.
markets.ui_description: TNS-classified supernova reaching the brightness threshold.

markets.title: Death Valley records a 130°F+ day in summer 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Death Valley hit 130°F?
markets.resolution_source: Furnace Creek NWS station.
markets.YES_condition: NWS Furnace Creek records max daily temperature ≥ 130°F (54.4°C) in summer 2026.
markets.why_interesting: Death Valley hit 130°F in 2020 and 2021. The bar requires extreme heat dome conditions.
markets.ui_description: Single-day threshold.

markets.title: A Japanese station records 5+ meters of snow in 2025/26 season
markets.simple_title: Will Japan see 5m+ snow this season?
markets.resolution_source: Japan Meteorological Agency.
markets.YES_condition: JMA records cumulative snow depth ≥ 5,000mm at any official station for the 2025/26 season.
markets.why_interesting: Niigata and Aomori prefectures regularly hit 4–5m. Crossing 5m is occasional.
markets.ui_description: Total seasonal snow depth at a single station.

markets.title: Aurora Australis visible from Tasmania mainland in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Tasmania see auroras this year?
markets.resolution_source: Bureau of Meteorology Australia + SpaceWeatherLive aggregator.
markets.YES_condition: At least three independent sighting reports (photo + location) place visible Aurora Australis from Tasmanian mainland (≥ -42°S) before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Tasmania sees auroras most years during solar max. Cycle 25 is declining but still active.
markets.ui_description: Three independent confirmed reports.

markets.title: Neuralink reports 50+ implanted patients by end of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Neuralink hit 50 implants?
markets.resolution_source: Neuralink press release or FDA disclosure.
markets.YES_condition: Neuralink publicly reports ≥ 50 patients implanted with the N1 device before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Neuralink had 12 patients implanted by end of 2025. The PRIME study has expanded to multiple sites.
markets.ui_description: Cumulative patient count threshold.

markets.title: Amazon launches a frontier-class proprietary LLM in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Amazon ship a frontier LLM?
markets.resolution_source: Amazon Web Services / AWS Bedrock release notes.
markets.YES_condition: Amazon releases a proprietary LLM scoring within 5 percentage points of GPT-4o or Claude 3.7 Sonnet on MMLU before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Amazon's Olympus / Titan / Nova lines have lagged frontier performance. Catching up is the strategic question.
markets.ui_description: Benchmark threshold against current leaders.

markets.title: VIX closes above 40 on any day in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will the VIX cross 40?
markets.resolution_source: CBOE VIX daily close.
markets.YES_condition: CBOE VIX index daily close ≥ 40.0 on any trading day before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: VIX spiked to 60 in April 2025 trade war. 40 is the standard 'major panic' threshold.
markets.ui_description: A volatility-shock market.

markets.title: U.S. establishes a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve via legislation in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Congress pass a Bitcoin reserve law?
markets.resolution_source: Public Law signed by the President.
markets.YES_condition: U.S. Congress passes and the President signs into law a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Trump signed an executive order in early 2025 to retain forfeited BTC. Statutory codification is the next step.
markets.ui_description: Executive order alone is NOT enough — must be enacted legislation.

markets.title: EU agrees on a €500B+ joint defense bond issuance in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will the EU issue €500B+ in defense bonds?
markets.resolution_source: European Council conclusions.
markets.YES_condition: European Council formally agrees on a joint defense bond issuance ≥ €500B before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: EU debate over joint defense bonds intensified in 2025. ReArm Europe has set the precedent.
markets.ui_description: Formal Council agreement on the program.

markets.title: Saturday Night Live remains on the air through end of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will SNL still air at year-end?
markets.resolution_source: NBC schedule.
markets.YES_condition: SNL continues with new episodes through 2026-12-31.
markets.why_interesting: SNL is in season 51. Lorne Michaels' future has been speculated, but the show's contracts run through 2027.
markets.ui_description: Cancellation announcement triggers NO.

markets.title: Any organization publicly demonstrates breaking RSA-2048 with a quantum computer in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will RSA-2048 be quantum-broken?
markets.resolution_source: Peer-reviewed paper or government cryptographic agency announcement.
markets.YES_condition: Any organization publicly publishes a verifiable quantum computation factoring an RSA-2048 modulus before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Q-day is a long-feared milestone. Current quantum systems are 100,000x short of needed scale. Strong NO.
markets.ui_description: A long-tail tech-risk hedge.

markets.title: JWST publishes 1,000+ peer-reviewed papers in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will JWST cross 1K papers in 2026?
markets.resolution_source: STScI publication tracker.
markets.YES_condition: STScI tracker logs ≥ 1,000 peer-reviewed papers using JWST data with publication year 2026.
markets.why_interesting: JWST hit ~750 papers in 2025. The growth trajectory points past 1K easily.
markets.ui_description: A productivity metric for the most-cited telescope of the decade.

markets.title: T1 wins League of Legends Worlds 2026
markets.simple_title: Will T1 win Worlds again?
markets.resolution_source: Riot Games official LoL Worlds result.
markets.YES_condition: Riot Games records T1 as the 2026 LoL World Champion.
markets.why_interesting: T1 won 2023, 2024, and was runner-up in 2025. Faker's longevity is unprecedented in esports.
markets.ui_description: Resolves at Worlds finals night in November.

markets.title: Islam Makhachev defends UFC lightweight title in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Makhachev hold the title at year-end?
markets.resolution_source: UFC official rankings on 2026-12-31.
markets.YES_condition: Makhachev is UFC lightweight champion on 2026-12-31 and has fought ≥ 1 title defense in 2026.
markets.why_interesting: Makhachev moved up to welterweight, vacated the lightweight belt in 2025. Returning to lightweight remains possible.
markets.ui_description: Both conditions required: title held + at least one defense.

markets.title: A Chinese-developed open-weights LLM tops the LMSys Arena leaderboard in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will a Chinese model lead Arena?
markets.resolution_source: LMSys Chatbot Arena.
markets.YES_condition: A Chinese-developed open-weights model holds the #1 position on LMSys Arena overall leaderboard at any point before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: DeepSeek and Alibaba's Qwen models have closed the gap. Topping a US lab on Arena would be a milestone.
markets.ui_description: Single-day #1 ranking is enough.

markets.title: Argentina officially dollarizes its economy in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Argentina dollarize?
markets.resolution_source: Argentine Government decree and IMF concurrence.
markets.YES_condition: Argentina officially adopts the U.S. dollar as legal tender via legislation or decree before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Milei has campaigned on dollarization since 2023. Implementation has been pushed back repeatedly.
markets.ui_description: Formal legal status — not de-facto dollarization.

markets.title: China's largest property developer (by revenue) avoids default through end of 2026
markets.simple_title: Will China's top property developer hold?
markets.resolution_source: Hong Kong Stock Exchange filings + Bloomberg credit reports.
markets.YES_condition: China's largest property developer by 2025 revenue avoids any new bond default through 2026-12-31.
markets.why_interesting: Country Garden, Vanke, and others have been on the brink. Stabilization measures have been mixed.
markets.ui_description: Cross-default count has shrunk relative to 2023–24.

markets.title: First commercial graphene-based battery product hits 100K+ units shipped in 2026
markets.simple_title: Will graphene batteries hit 100K shipped?
markets.resolution_source: Manufacturer disclosures + IDTechEx market report.
markets.YES_condition: A consumer or industrial product using graphene-enhanced battery chemistry exceeds 100,000 units shipped to customers before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: Graphene battery commercialization has been promised for a decade. Real shipping is rare.
markets.ui_description: Customer shipments only — pilot programs don't count.
